items.title: World Cup bronze final at Hard Rock Stadium - today 5pm
items.blurb: The 2026 World Cup third-place match plays out in Miami Gardens today. Watch parties at Wynwood Marketplace from 3pm.

items.title: Heat land Giannis Antetokounmpo in blockbuster trade
items.blurb: Miami sent Herro, Ware, Jaquez and Jakucionis to Milwaukee for the two-time MVP. Davion Mitchell heads to Greece this month to start building chemistry.

items.title: A July rate HIKE? Odds are rising
items.blurb: FedWatch puts 46% odds on a quarter-point hike July 29. Warsh has turned hawkish with PCE at 3.6%. BofA now sees three hikes by December.

items.title: Marlins hit the break 52-45, holding NL Wild Card pole position
items.blurb: A franchise-record 20-6 June has Miami two back of Philly. Six-game road trip through Milwaukee and Houston starts now.

items.title: Panthers complete swift roster makeover: Tkachuk in, Bobrovsky out
items.blurb: Brady Tkachuk acquired from Ottawa, Markstrom and Schmid form the new goalie tandem, Luostarinen extended eight years. Bob signed with Toronto.

items.title: The 9 most anticipated Miami restaurant openings of summer 2026
items.blurb: La Sponda on Grove Isle, Michelin-trained Greek at Manoli in the Grove, PopUp Bagels hits Brickell, and China Grill returns to South Beach.

items.title: CBRE: investors set to deploy more capital as CRE stabilizes
items.blurb: Investment volume projected up 16% to $562B in 2026; 55% of investors raising allocations. MBA sees $805B in originations, up 27%.

items.title: Canes preview: fresh off the title game, this roster might be better
items.blurb: Mensah at QB, two 1,000-yard receivers back, ACC favorite. Big question is an O-line replacing four starters. Opener at Stanford, Sept 4.

items.title: Dolphins camp opens: rookies report Monday, Hafley era begins
items.blurb: Rookies in July 21, veterans July 28 at Baptist Health Training Complex. Free practices open to fans start Aug 2.

items.title: Fed Monetary Policy Report - July 2026 (primary source)
items.blurb: The full semiannual report to Congress, released July 10. Worth a skim before the July 29 meeting.

items.title: The School of Life: The Stoics
items.blurb: The canonical primer - Stoicism as training for staying calm and brave in the face of anxiety. A good re-read for a Saturday.

items.title: Daily Stoic interviews Alain de Botton
items.blurb: De Botton on consolation, expectations, and why philosophy should be useful. The crossover episode of your two favorite schools.

items.title: The Infatuation: Miami new-openings guide, updated
items.blurb: The running list of what just opened and whether it is worth your night out.

items.title: Six exercises to actually practice Stoicism in a stressful world
items.blurb: Negative visualization, voluntary discomfort, the view from above - the practical drills, not just the quotes.
